name: shangtech-website
description: 上科官网项目 - Monorepo架构

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=web && npm run build --workspace=cms && npm run build --workspace=api
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:web" "npm run start:cms" "npm run start:api"
